title: Mahindra Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mahindra Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahindra Logistics:
Mahindra Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
